differentiation: gap-reverse-filter as the product: filter for what businesses LACK (inverts BuiltWith/Wappalyzer); output = weakness + agentic service to sell
$0 zero-paid-API self-hosted vs credit-metered category ($15k-25k/yr to per-phone credits)
agentic closed loop discover->gap-audit->pitch->fulfill via Geronimo + Vuecra (competitors stop at data or outreach)
Cuiaba/BR-native: CNPJ/CNAE/QSA + Maps long-tail owner-operated locals + PT-BR + WhatsApp
owns channels end-to-end (LI stealth + email + WhatsApp on VM), no tool-stitching/per-seat fee
24/7 self-improving Brain (Brain.decide F.6 + F.4 auto-skill-forge w/ sandbox + golden-case gating)
unexplored-zones as first-class concept (swept-vs-unswept coverage feedback loop); computed stage gating not human-dragged
open_questions: Conveyor license: Twenty (AGPL, richer) vs Atomic CRM (MIT, recommended). Confirm Atomic?
Any owner-keyed paid MCP exceptions (Apollo/Hunter/Exa) for verified email/phone gaps, or strictly $0?
Gap-audit scope: include AI-visibility (ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity) like MyWebAudit, or classic signals only?
Discovery priority: lead CNPJ+OSM (zero ban) and use gmaps only for gaps, or gmaps primary (anti-bot risk on VM)?
Conveyor backend: Supabase (Atomic default) or reuse existing Hermes prospects DB?
